TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Yangmingsan a pisalama'an Masako 01-22-2011 I kaliponan ho i. "Cawsan"hananay ko ngangan no Yangmingsan a pisalama'an 山". Kalichan ko pasu tatayla I Yangminsan nani tata'akay a lalan no Yangminsan mamacukacuk ko pasu. I pasayla'ay I Selin a niyar'o Mitafeshow ho to Yangtetataw tiya tahilato I lotok Tahilato I Yangminsan ira'ay ho ko pasayra'ay I Cinsan ato Wanli a pafesotay I riyal a kinigtolo. awa'ay ko sasuwaren to kapah ato fangcal no Yangmingsan a pisalama'an Marawod to ko kamok no hana I sakatolo a fulad O kacifalo'an to no hana, o kacicuongan no kilang anini Adihay ko masamasamanay a tilid no hana ,irako masasiloma'ay a sakora,lopas,toc'in. Sakora hananay a hana o sacinganganay no Yangminsan.Na sakatolo a fulad I aloman ko pasayniay misalama a tamdaw . Misa'osian ko cikang a mamacukacuk na lotok Padeteng ko matayalay I kosi a tamtamdaw mihifan Palimaw tara I lotok minengneng to hana. O tatenokan no kasa'opo'an no misarama'ay ko Yangminsan Ira'ay ho ko citatodongay a pasifan'ay to defang ato koko nona Yangminsan a pisalama'an. Yangmingsan a pisalama'an I sa'amis no TayPak', O kongnan ninra ko Selin,P'ito a lalotokan,ato pasayla'ay laliyalan a niyar'o. o lotok no itiniay I 200~1120 meta ko takaraw. Masasiloma ko romi'ad i lotok no Yangmigsan .Na sakatolo a fulad namiheca'an o kacangrahan aloman ko pasayniay misalama a icuwacuwa'ay kanatar a tabdaw.satosil sa ko sakora a mafetelak fiw~han no fail I sataontaon sa matawa .na malorayay a mata, sienaway a faloc'o . masinanot itini a lotok Palimaw to tara I lotok minengneng to makapahay a hana . Kaciharangan to no Yanmingsan tadafaeded ko Taypak.O pikisaemelan kona lotok. Oloma siy'a sako 'odad Ikol to no 'odad, nohoni ira o to ko cidal amingada, I ra'ay a lotok ira ko talakal ni idek a masadak sakapahsan ko tilid miedir tona lotok. Marawod to ko pipanayan I sakamoetep a fulad Malakahengan to ko lotolotokan mafalic to ko tilid no pahpah I kilangkilangan ,sakahengan ko adingol a kilang , fiw~han no pasa'amisay a kietecay a fail Maeminmatefad to ko papah no kilang . Marawod ko kasienawan I ; O romi'ad no lotok macep'a to nano raliday a 'odad ,tata'anay ko sienaw itini ,madipadip tono calofacud ko lalang ato lotok ,loma ira ko malasuda"ay to ko semo ato papah no kilang satemel'i san to kona lotok
S.PHON: jaŋmiŋsan a pisaɾamaʡan masako~u **-**-**** i kaɾipo~unan ħo~u i. "ʦawsan"ħananaj ko~u ŋaŋan no~u jaŋmiŋsan a pisaɾamaʡan *". kaɾiʦħan ko~u paso~u~u tatajɾa i jaŋminsan nani tataʡakaj a ɾaɾan no~u jaŋminsan mamaʦo~u~ukaʦo~u~uk ko~u paso~u~u. i pasajɾaʡaj i səɾin a nijarʡo~u mitafəsħo~uw ħo~u to~u jaŋtətataw tija taħiɾato~u i ɾo~uto~uk taħiɾato~u i jaŋminsan iraʡaj ħo~u ko~u pasajraʡaj i ʦinsan ato~u wanɾi a pafəso~utaj i rijaɾ a kini*to~uɾo~u. awaʡaj ko~u saso~u~uwarən to~u kapaħ ato~u faŋʦaɾ no~u jaŋmiŋsan a pisaɾamaʡan marawo~uɬ~ɮ to~u ko~u kamo~uk no~u ħana i sakato~uɾo~u a fo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ o~u kaʦifaɾo~uʡan to~u no~u ħana, o~u kaʦiʦo~u~uo~uŋan no~u kiɾaŋ anini aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u masamasamanaj a tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u ħana ,irako~u masasiɾo~umaʡaj a sako~ura,ɾo~upas,to~uʦʡin. sako~ura ħananaj a ħana o~u saʦiŋaŋanaj no~u jaŋminsan.na sakato~uɾo~u a fo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ i aɾo~uman ko~u pasajniaj misaɾama a tamɬ~ɮaw . misaʡo~usian ko~u ʦikaŋ a mamaʦo~u~ukaʦo~u~uk na ɾo~uto~uk paɬ~ɮətəŋ ko~u matajaɾaj i ko~usi a tamtamɬ~ɮaw miħifan paɾimaw tara i ɾo~uto~uk minəŋnəŋ to~u ħana. o~u tatəno~ukan no~u kasaʡo~upo~uʡan no~u misaramaʡaj ko~u jaŋminsan iraʡaj ħo~u ko~u ʦitato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj a pasifanʡaj to~u ɬ~ɮəfaŋ ato~u ko~uko~u no~una jaŋminsan a pisaɾamaʡan. jaŋmiŋsan a pisaɾamaʡan i saʡamis no~u tajpakʡ, o~u ko~uŋnan ninra ko~u səɾin,pʡito~u a ɾaɾo~uto~ukan,ato~u pasajɾaʡaj ɾaɾijaɾan a nijarʡo~u. o~u ɾo~uto~uk no~u itiniaj i ***~**** məta ko~u takaraw. masasiɾo~uma ko~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i ɾo~uto~uk no~u jaŋmi*san .na sakato~uɾo~u a fo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ namiħəʦaʡan o~u kaʦaŋraħan aɾo~uman ko~u pasajniaj misaɾama a iʦo~u~uwaʦo~u~uwaʡaj kanatar a tab~b~vɬ~ɮaw.sato~usiɾ sa ko~u sako~ura a mafətəɾak fiw~ħan no~u faiɾ i satao~untao~un sa matawa .na maɾo~urajaj a mata, siənawaj a faɾo~uʦʡo~u . masinano~ut itini a ɾo~uto~uk paɾimaw to~u tara i ɾo~uto~uk minəŋnəŋ to~u makapaħaj a ħana . kaʦiħaraŋan to~u no~u janmiŋsan taɬ~ɮafaəɬ~ɮəɬ~ɮ ko~u tajpak.o~u pikisaəməɾan ko~una ɾo~uto~uk. o~uɾo~uma sijʡa sako~u ʡo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ iko~uɾ to~u no~u ʡo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ, no~uħo~uni ira o~u to~u ko~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ amiŋaɬ~ɮa, i raʡaj a ɾo~uto~uk ira ko~u taɾakaɾ ni iɬ~ɮək a masaɬ~ɮak sakapaħsan ko~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ miəɬ~ɮir to~una ɾo~uto~uk. marawo~uɬ~ɮ to~u ko~u pipanajan i sakamo~uətəp a fo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ maɾakaħəŋan to~u ko~u ɾo~uto~uɾo~uto~ukan mafaɾiʦ to~u ko~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u paħpaħ i kiɾaŋkiɾaŋan ,sakaħəŋan ko~u aɬ~ɮiŋo~uɾ a kiɾaŋ , fiw~ħan no~u pasaʡamisaj a kiətəʦaj a faiɾ maəminmatəfaɬ~ɮ to~u ko~u papaħ no~u kiɾaŋ . marawo~uɬ~ɮ ko~u kasiənawan i ; o~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~uto~uk maʦəpʡa to~u nano~u raɾiɬ~ɮaj a ʡo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ ,tataʡanaj ko~u siənaw itini ,maɬ~ɮipaɬ~ɮip to~uno~u ʦaɾo~ufaʦo~u~uɬ~ɮ ko~u ɾaɾaŋ ato~u ɾo~uto~uk ,ɾo~uma ira ko~u maɾaso~u~uɬ~ɮa"aj to~u ko~u səmo~u ato~u papaħ no~u kiɾaŋ satəməɾʡi san to~u ko~una ɾo~uto~uk
S.FORM: Yangmingsan a pisalama'an Masako 01-22-2011 I kaliponan ho i. "Cawsan"hananay ko ngangan no Yangmingsan a pisalama'an 山". Kalichan ko pasu tatayla I Yangminsan nani tata'akay a lalan no Yangminsan mamacukacuk ko pasu. I pasayla'ay I Selin a niyar'o Mitafeshow ho to Yangtetataw tiya tahilato I lotok Tahilato I Yangminsan ira'ay ho ko pasayra'ay I Cinsan ato Wanli a pafesotay I riyal a kinigtolo. awa'ay ko sasuwaren to kapah ato fangcal no Yangmingsan a pisalama'an Marawod to ko kamok no hana I sakatolo a fulad O kacifalo'an to no hana, o kacicuongan no kilang anini Adihay ko masamasamanay a tilid no hana ,irako masasiloma'ay a sakora,lopas,toc'in. Sakora hananay a hana o sacinganganay no Yangminsan.Na sakatolo a fulad I aloman ko pasayniay misalama a tamdaw . Misa'osian ko cikang a mamacukacuk na lotok Padeteng ko matayalay I kosi a tamtamdaw mihifan Palimaw tara I lotok minengneng to hana. O tatenokan no kasa'opo'an no misarama'ay ko Yangminsan Ira'ay ho ko citatodongay a pasifan'ay to defang ato koko nona Yangminsan a pisalama'an. Yangmingsan a pisalama'an I sa'amis no TayPak', O kongnan ninra ko Selin,P'ito a lalotokan,ato pasayla'ay laliyalan a niyar'o. o lotok no itiniay I 200~1120 meta ko takaraw. Masasiloma ko romi'ad i lotok no Yangmigsan .Na sakatolo a fulad namiheca'an o kacangrahan aloman ko pasayniay misalama a icuwacuwa'ay kanatar a tabdaw.satosil sa ko sakora a mafetelak fiw~han no fail I sataontaon sa matawa .na malorayay a mata, sienaway a faloc'o . masinanot itini a lotok Palimaw to tara I lotok minengneng to makapahay a hana . Kaciharangan to no Yanmingsan tadafaeded ko Taypak.O pikisaemelan kona lotok. Oloma siy'a sako 'odad Ikol to no 'odad, nohoni ira o to ko cidal amingada, I ra'ay a lotok ira ko talakal ni idek a masadak sakapahsan ko tilid miedir tona lotok. Marawod to ko pipanayan I sakamoetep a fulad Malakahengan to ko lotolotokan mafalic to ko tilid no pahpah I kilangkilangan ,sakahengan ko adingol a kilang , fiw~han no pasa'amisay a kietecay a fail Maeminmatefad to ko papah no kilang . Marawod ko kasienawan I ; O romi'ad no lotok macep'a to nano raliday a 'odad ,tata'anay ko sienaw itini ,madipadip tono calofacud ko lalang ato lotok ,loma ira ko malasuda"ay to ko semo ato papah no kilang satemel'i san to kona lotok
S.PHON: jaŋmiŋsan a pisaɾamaʡan masako~u **-**-**** i kaɾipo~unan ħo~u i. "ʦawsan"ħananaj ko~u ŋaŋan no~u jaŋmiŋsan a pisaɾamaʡan *". kaɾiʦħan ko~u paso~u~u tatajɾa i jaŋminsan nani tataʡakaj a ɾaɾan no~u jaŋminsan mamaʦo~u~ukaʦo~u~uk ko~u paso~u~u. i pasajɾaʡaj i səɾin a nijarʡo~u mitafəsħo~uw ħo~u to~u jaŋtətataw tija taħiɾato~u i ɾo~uto~uk taħiɾato~u i jaŋminsan iraʡaj ħo~u ko~u pasajraʡaj i ʦinsan ato~u wanɾi a pafəso~utaj i rijaɾ a kini*to~uɾo~u. awaʡaj ko~u saso~u~uwarən to~u kapaħ ato~u faŋʦaɾ no~u jaŋmiŋsan a pisaɾamaʡan marawo~uɬ~ɮ to~u ko~u kamo~uk no~u ħana i sakato~uɾo~u a fo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ o~u kaʦifaɾo~uʡan to~u no~u ħana, o~u kaʦiʦo~u~uo~uŋan no~u kiɾaŋ anini aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u masamasamanaj a tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u ħana ,irako~u masasiɾo~umaʡaj a sako~ura,ɾo~upas,to~uʦʡin. sako~ura ħananaj a ħana o~u saʦiŋaŋanaj no~u jaŋminsan.na sakato~uɾo~u a fo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ i aɾo~uman ko~u pasajniaj misaɾama a tamɬ~ɮaw . misaʡo~usian ko~u ʦikaŋ a mamaʦo~u~ukaʦo~u~uk na ɾo~uto~uk paɬ~ɮətəŋ ko~u matajaɾaj i ko~usi a tamtamɬ~ɮaw miħifan paɾimaw tara i ɾo~uto~uk minəŋnəŋ to~u ħana. o~u tatəno~ukan no~u kasaʡo~upo~uʡan no~u misaramaʡaj ko~u jaŋminsan iraʡaj ħo~u ko~u ʦitato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj a pasifanʡaj to~u ɬ~ɮəfaŋ ato~u ko~uko~u no~una jaŋminsan a pisaɾamaʡan. jaŋmiŋsan a pisaɾamaʡan i saʡamis no~u tajpakʡ, o~u ko~uŋnan ninra ko~u səɾin,pʡito~u a ɾaɾo~uto~ukan,ato~u pasajɾaʡaj ɾaɾijaɾan a nijarʡo~u. o~u ɾo~uto~uk no~u itiniaj i ***~**** məta ko~u takaraw. masasiɾo~uma ko~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i ɾo~uto~uk no~u jaŋmi*san .na sakato~uɾo~u a fo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ namiħəʦaʡan o~u kaʦaŋraħan aɾo~uman ko~u pasajniaj misaɾama a iʦo~u~uwaʦo~u~uwaʡaj kanatar a tab~b~vɬ~ɮaw.sato~usiɾ sa ko~u sako~ura a mafətəɾak fiw~ħan no~u faiɾ i satao~untao~un sa matawa .na maɾo~urajaj a mata, siənawaj a faɾo~uʦʡo~u . masinano~ut itini a ɾo~uto~uk paɾimaw to~u tara i ɾo~uto~uk minəŋnəŋ to~u makapaħaj a ħana . kaʦiħaraŋan to~u no~u janmiŋsan taɬ~ɮafaəɬ~ɮəɬ~ɮ ko~u tajpak.o~u pikisaəməɾan ko~una ɾo~uto~uk. o~uɾo~uma sijʡa sako~u ʡo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ iko~uɾ to~u no~u ʡo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ, no~uħo~uni ira o~u to~u ko~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ amiŋaɬ~ɮa, i raʡaj a ɾo~uto~uk ira ko~u taɾakaɾ ni iɬ~ɮək a masaɬ~ɮak sakapaħsan ko~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ miəɬ~ɮir to~una ɾo~uto~uk. marawo~uɬ~ɮ to~u ko~u pipanajan i sakamo~uətəp a fo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ maɾakaħəŋan to~u ko~u ɾo~uto~uɾo~uto~ukan mafaɾiʦ to~u ko~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u paħpaħ i kiɾaŋkiɾaŋan ,sakaħəŋan ko~u aɬ~ɮiŋo~uɾ a kiɾaŋ , fiw~ħan no~u pasaʡamisaj a kiətəʦaj a faiɾ maəminmatəfaɬ~ɮ to~u ko~u papaħ no~u kiɾaŋ . marawo~uɬ~ɮ ko~u kasiənawan i ; o~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~uto~uk maʦəpʡa to~u nano~u raɾiɬ~ɮaj a ʡo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ ,tataʡanaj ko~u siənaw itini ,maɬ~ɮipaɬ~ɮip to~uno~u ʦaɾo~ufaʦo~u~uɬ~ɮ ko~u ɾaɾaŋ ato~u ɾo~uto~uk ,ɾo~uma ira ko~u maɾaso~u~uɬ~ɮa"aj to~u ko~u səmo~u ato~u papaħ no~u kiɾaŋ satəməɾʡi san to~u ko~una ɾo~uto~uk
